value: Using science-driven Response Diversity knowledge to Leverage Efficient Ecosystem Preservation and restoration
Identify and elucidate mechanisms through which response diversity contributes to socio-ecological resilience under different environmental stressors.
Develop and validate a reproducible standardised toolkit of metrics and empirical methods for quantifying response diversity across ecosystems and spatiotemporal scales.
Co-design practical frameworks for integrating response diversity into conservation restoration and policy decision-making across diverse socio-ecological contexts.
Facilitate efficient knowledge development through a tailored combination of theoretical empirical and practical training.
Foster interdisciplinary and intersectoral collaboration to close gaps between ecological research policymaking and practical implementation.
Promote active engagement in transformative change supporting global and EU initiatives for ecosystem restoration and biodiversity conservation.
